income_statement_q.advanced_tech_note: Q1 2026 advanced tech costs jumped $15.9M YoY — Piketon/Oak Ridge R&D and engineering for expansion

cash_flow_q.note: Negative OCF driven by inventory build. CapEx accelerating — Q1 2026 $23.2M vs FY2025 full year $19.7M.

backlog_q1.note: RPO = contracted + funded obligations. Backlog includes unfunded/contingent. $2.4B contingent LEU depends on Piketon expansion.

segment_yoy.note: Q1 typically low for LEU deliveries (seasonal). SWU volume -47% offset by price +52%. Tech revenue up on HALEU Option 1a (funded $108.2M through June 2026).

key_events_q1.900m_haleu_task_order: Jan 5, 2026: $900M DOE task order under HALEU Production Contract. Definitive agreement under negotiation.
key_events_q1.fluor_epc_contract: Feb 2026: EPC contract with Fluor for Piketon expansion. Geiger Brothers construction contract April 2026.
key_events_q1.oklo_jv_announcement: March 2026: Exploring JV with Oklo for HALEU deconversion at Piketon.
key_events_q1.swu_spot_price: $200/SWU as of March 31, 2026 (unchanged from Dec 2025, historic high)
